lines.flavourText:
"Rage, malice, hunger - some traits are more easily carried across the barrier of death."
- Kadavrus, Surgeon to the Umbra

lines.flavourText:
"Try as I might, I could not escape it.
When I closed my eyes, I saw only death.
Each breath tainted with the scent of seared and smouldering flesh,
And each sound tangled with pleas for mercy."

lines.flavourText:
"We awoke to a sudden dawn cresting through the mountains.
Each peak rose into searing fire, a massive roiling tide.
A great eye gazed upon us, and we became known—utterly."

lines.name: Forbidden Flame
lines.flavourText:
The minds of those studied utterly by the Cleansing Fire
continue to think and dream and beg for silence...

The bodies of those wholly subsumed by the Tangle
continue to merge and mutate and cry out for release...

lines.flavourText: They believed themselves the utmost faithful, but that conviction became oppression.

lines.name: Beauty

They took pride in all that they built, considering each new
temple a testament to the gods... and then, to themselves.

lines.flavourText:
One by one, they stood their ground against a creature 
they had no hope of understanding, let alone defeating,
and one by one, they became a part of it.

lines.name: Atziri's Reign
lines.flavourText:
Atziri went to great lengths to ensure her immortality,
but nothing is eternal.

They roamed, they fed, they grew,
Killing as they went,
Conquer though they may,
Their hearts will never be content.

lines.flavourText:
"The swallow flew fast and took many turns,
spilling a seed where no plant had grown before. 
This seed grew and grew until the desert became fertile and abundant. 
Your mind is like this seed." 
- Maraketh Proverb

lines.flavourText:
The enslaved Ezomyte clans were not permitted to own weapons.
For years, they trained in secret, watching and waiting for the
perfect moment to reveal the true depth of the Empire's folly.

lines.flavourText:
"Greatly outnumbered, Deshret dressed her personal guard 
in identical garb. When the Empire rode north, Deshret and 
her guard took turns revealing themselves, creating the illusion 
of speed beyond the capabilities of even the Virtue Gems."
- History of the Maraketh

explicitModifiers.text: (7-13)% increased Chaos Damage
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Blight inflicts Withered for 2 seconds
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Blight has 50% increased Hinder Duration
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Blight has 30% reduced Cast Speed

lines.flavourText:
The Cataclysm was but the first act in a play of horrors.
The dead lingered, and the living began to rot.

lines.name: Efficient Training

implicitModifiers.text: 20% increased total Recovery per second from Mana Leech
20% increased total Recovery per second from Life Leech
1% of Damage taken gained as Mana over 4 seconds when Hit
1% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana
20% increased Recovery per second from Life Leech
(4-5)% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
(10-15)% reduced Effect of Chill on you
(10-15)% reduced Effect of Shock on you

explicitModifiers.text: +(16-24) to Strength
Intelligence from Passives in Radius is Transformed to Strength

lines.flavourText: Working smart and working hard aren't mutually exclusive.

lines.name: Energised Armour

implicitModifiers.text: 20% increased total Recovery per second from Life Leech
10% reduced Effect of Chill on you
20% increased Recovery per second from Life Leech
(3-6)% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
1% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana
(10-15)% reduced Effect of Shock on you
20% increased total Recovery per second from Mana Leech

explicitModifiers.text: (15-20)% increased Armour
Increases and Reductions to Energy Shield in Radius are Transformed to apply to Armour at 200% of their value

lines.flavourText: "I've yet to see prayer stop an arrow."

lines.name: Lioneye's Fall

implicitModifiers.text: (3-6)% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
20% increased total Recovery per second from Mana Leech
20% increased total Recovery per second from Life Leech
1% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana
(10-15)% reduced Effect of Shock on you
(10-15)% reduced Effect of Chill on you
Item sells for much more to vendors

explicitModifiers.text: Melee and Melee Weapon Type modifiers in Radius are Transformed to Bow Modifiers

lines.flavourText:
The shield crab does not leave his shell unless it is forced to, 
and even then, it knows to keep its distance.

lines.name: The Red Dream

implicitModifiers.text: 20% increased total Recovery per second from Life Leech
20% increased Recovery per second from Life Leech
20% increased total Recovery per second from Mana Leech
(10-15)% reduced Effect of Chill on you
1% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana

explicitModifiers.text: Gain (5-10)% of Fire Damage as Extra Chaos Damage

Passives granting Fire Resistance or all Elemental Resistances in Radius
also grant an equal chance to gain an Endurance Charge on Kill

lines.flavourText:
We flow like blood into Chayula's open mouth,
and spill into the land we have watched forever.

lines.name: The Balance of Terror

explicitModifiers.text: +(10-15)% to all Elemental Resistances
Action Speed cannot be Slowed below Base Value if you've cast Temporal Chains in the past 10 seconds
Action Speed cannot be modified to below Base Value if you've cast Temporal Chains in the past 10 seconds
(6-10)% chance to deal Double Damage if you've cast Vulnerability in the past 10 seconds
(20-25)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate if you've cast Temporal Chains in the past 10 seconds
Immune to Curses if you've cast Despair in the past 10 seconds
Inflict Lightning Exposure on Hit if you've cast Conductivity in the past 10 seconds
Immune to Reflected Damage if you've cast Punishment in the past 10 seconds
Inflict Withered for 2 seconds on Hit if you've cast Despair in the past 10 seconds
Gain (30-40)% of Physical Damage as a Random Element if you've cast Elemental Weakness in the past 10 seconds
Inflict Fire Exposure on Hit if you've cast Flammability in the past 10 seconds
You are Unaffected by Ignite if you've cast Flammability in the past 10 seconds
You are Unaffected by Shock if you've cast Conductivity in the past 10 seconds
You are Unaffected by Bleeding if you've cast Vulnerability in the past 10 seconds
Intimidate Enemies on Hit if you've cast Punishment in the past 10 seconds
Cold Exposure on Hit if you've cast Frostbite in the past 10 seconds
Take no Extra Damage from Critical Strikes if you've cast Enfeeble in the past 10 seconds
You are Unaffected by Freeze if you've cast Frostbite in the past 10 seconds
+(30-40)% to Critical Strike Multiplier if you've cast Enfeeble in the past 10 seconds
Immune to Exposure if you've cast Elemental Weakness in the past 10 seconds

lines.flavourText:
Fellshrine stood as a holy bastion opposite the
Chamber of Sins, and all that it represented.
For one to rise, the other must fall.

lines.name: Static Electricity

implicitModifiers.text: 4% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
1% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana

explicitModifiers.text: Adds 1 to 2 Lightning Damage to Attacks
Adds 1 maximum Lightning Damage to Attacks per 1 Dexterity Allocated in Radius

lines.flavourText:
"Movement expends energy, but perhaps a little of that energy
can be recaptured and... reappropriated."
- Inquisitor Maligaro

lines.name: Growing Agony

implicitModifiers.text: 10% reduced Effect of Chill on you
1% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana

explicitModifiers.text: (4-12)% increased Damage over Time
With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Viper Strike deals 2% increased Damage with Hits and Poison for each Poison on the Enemy
With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Viper Strike has a 10% chance per Poison on Enemy to grant Unholy Might for 4 seconds on Hit

lines.flavourText:
Maligaro understood that devotion to science,
Means devotion to trial and error.
For Maligaro's errors, death was slow,
And very painful.

lines.name: Replica Primordial Might

explicitModifiers.text: -1 to maximum number of Golems
-1 to maximum number of Summoned Golems
(25-30)% increased Damage if you Summoned a Golem in the past 8 seconds
Golems Summoned in the past 8 seconds deal (100-125)% increased Damage
Golems have (18-22)% increased Maximum Life
Primordial
Summoned Golems are Aggressive

lines.flavourText:
"The summoned golems immediately battered through the chamber wall
and killed several guards, but their fury only lasted a short time."

lines.name: Replica Pacifism
lines.flavourText:
"Release the type Delta test subjects. Unseal all prototype lockers.
Arm yourself! I know that, as researchers, you've never had to fight
before, but they're coming to kill us all. It's resist or die!"
- Lead Researcher Ksaret, two hours post-Incident

lines.name: To Dust

implicitModifiers.text: 1% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana
20% increased total Recovery per second from Mana Leech
15% reduced Effect of Shock on you
20% increased total Recovery per second from Life Leech
15% reduced Effect of Chill on you
(3-6)% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills

explicitModifiers.text: (10-20)% reduced Skeleton Duration
Minions deal (8-12)% increased Damage
(2-10)% increased Skeleton Attack Speed
(7-10)% increased Skeleton Cast Speed
(3-5)% increased Skeleton Movement Speed

lines.flavourText:
In the end, time comes for all of us.
For some, it comes much sooner.

lines.name: Assassin's Haste

implicitModifiers.text: 10% reduced Effect of Chill on you
20% increased total Recovery per second from Life Leech
10% reduced Effect of Shock on you
5% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills

explicitModifiers.text: 10% increased Mana Regeneration Rate
4% increased Movement Speed
4% increased Attack and Cast Speed

lines.flavourText: A quick step can advance great plans.

lines.name: Vaal Sentencing
lines.flavourText:
In their final days, every crime was punishable by death.
Atziri's empire ran on blood, but the blood was running dry.

lines.name: Fight for Survival

implicitModifiers.text: 20% increased total Recovery per second from Mana Leech
1% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana
20% increased total Recovery per second from Life Leech
3% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills

explicitModifiers.text: (10-15)% increased Cold Damage

With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Melee Damage
dealt by Frost Blades Penetrates 15% Cold Resistance
With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Frost Blades has 25% increased Projectile Speed

lines.flavourText:
The winter that followed the Cataclysm was especially harsh.
Wraeclast's few survivors fought to the death for the last scraps of bread.
